mlb.description: Reinstated RHP Matt Waldron from the 15-day IL. Optioned RHP Jhony Brito to El Paso (PCL).

Reinstated RHP Landon Knack from the 60-day IL. Designated LHP Charlie Barnes for assignment. Optioned RHP Kyle Hurt to Oklahoma City (PCL). Sent RHP Edwin Díaz on a rehab assignment to Ontario (A-California).
Sent RHP Hayden Wesneski on a rehab assignment to Sugar Land (PCL).
Reinstated RHP Yaramil Hiraldo from the 60-day IL and optioned him to Norfolk.
Reinstated RHP Phil Maton from the 15-day IL. Designated RHP Jake Woodford for assignment. Sent RHP Jaemson Taillon on a rehab assignment to Iowa (IL).
Claimed RHP Andre Granillo off waivers from Washington and optioned him to Toledo (IL).
Sent RHP Jean Cabrera outright to Reading (EL).
Sent RHP Matt Seelinger outright to Syracuse (IL). Released CF Jared Oliva.
Placed LHP Kyle Harrison on the 15-day IL, retroactive to July 9. Recalled LHP Robert Gasser and RHP Garrett Stallings from Nashville (IL).
Optioned RHP TJ Shook to Albuquerque (PCL). Recalled RHP Jeff Criswell from Albuquerque.

Sent RHP AJ Smith-Shawver on a rehab assignment to Gwinnett (IL). Agreed to terms with LHP Braden Scott on a minor league contract. Placed OF Mike Yastrzemski on the 10-day IL. Recalled RHP Owen Murphy and OF Brewer Hicklen from Gwinnett. Optioned RHP James Karinchak to Gwinnett. Sent OF José Azócar outright to Gwinnett.

Activated RHP Tommy Nance. Optioned RHP Eric Orze to St. Paul (IL). Claimed RHP Jack Anderson off waivers from Boston. Transferred LHP Anthony Banda to the 60-day IL. Sent RHP Garret Acton on a rehab assignment to Fort Myers (FSL).

Designated RHP Cam Sanders for assignment. Transferred SS Konnor Griffin to the 60-day IL. Optioned SS Jack Brannigan and RHP Thomas Harrington to Indianapolis (IL). Sent RHP Wilber Dotel on a rehab assignment to Indianapolis. Recalled RHP Noah Murdock from Indianapolis.
Acquired LHP Jaden Woods and future considerations from Pittsburgh in exchange for LHP Brandon Eisert and 1B Jacob Gonzalez. Recalled LHP Tyler Schweitzer from Charlotte (IL).
Recalled LHP Eduardo Rivera from Worcester (IL). Optioned INF Brett Harris to Worcester.
Recalled C Brian Serven from Las Vegas (PCL). Placed 1B Nick Kurtz on the 10-day IL, retroactive to July 10.
Placed OF Victor Bericoto on the 10-day IL. Reinstated RHP keaton Winn from the 15-day IL. Recalled OF Grant McCray from Sacramento (PCL). Optioned LHP Carson Whisenhunt to Sacramento.
Sent LHP Jared Shuster outright to Memphis. Agreed to terms with 2B JJ Wetherholt on an eight-year contract.
Reinstated HP Braydon Fisher from the bereavement list.
Reinstated RHP Grayson Rodriguez from the 15-day IL. Optioned LHP Tayler Saucedo to Salt Lake (PCL).
Placed 1B Mark Vientos on the 10-day IL. Designated RHP Dan Hammer for assignment. Selected the contract of SS Zack Short from Syracuse (IL). Recalled RHP Tobias Myers from Syracuse.
Reinstated RHP Tyler Kinley from the paternity list. Optioned RHP Hurston Waldrep to Gwinnett (IL).
Recalled OF Ryan Waldschmidt to Reno (PCL). Designated INF Pavin Smith for assignment.
Placed 3B Zack Gelof on the 10-day IL. Recalled 1B Joey Meneses from Las Vegas (PCL).
Transferred RHP Jake Irvin to the 60-day IL. Selected the contract of LHP Tom Cosgrove from Rochester (IL).
